name: app.R
content:
library(shiny)
library(DT)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

# Scenario presets taken from the Excel workbook tabs
scenario_presets <- list(
  "Default" = list(
    rev_a = 500, rev_b = 250, rev_c = 250,
    cost_a = 300, cost_b = 150, cost_c = 150,
    overhead = 100,
    tax_rate_a = 30, tax_rate_b = 10, tax_rate_c = 10
  ),
  "Diff Margins BC" = list(
    rev_a = 500, rev_b = 250, rev_c = 250,
    cost_a = 300, cost_b = 100, cost_c = 200,
    overhead = 100,
    tax_rate_a = 30, tax_rate_b = 10, tax_rate_c = 10
  ),
  "Diff WHT BC" = list(
    rev_a = 500, rev_b = 250, rev_c = 250,
    cost_a = 300, cost_b = 150, cost_c = 150,
    overhead = 100,
    tax_rate_a = 30, tax_rate_b = 2, tax_rate_c = 18
  ),
  "High Foreign+Low Residence Profits" = list(
    rev_a = 500, rev_b = 250, rev_c = 250,
    cost_a = 350, cost_b = 125, cost_c = 125,
    overhead = 100,
    tax_rate_a = 30, tax_rate_b = 10, tax_rate_c = 10
  ),
  "Low Foreign+High Residence Profits" = list(
    rev_a = 500, rev_b = 250, rev_c = 250,
    cost_a = 200, cost_b = 200, cost_c = 200,
    overhead = 100,
    tax_rate_a = 30, tax_rate_b = 10, tax_rate_c = 10
  ),
  "Overhead-heavy" = list(
    rev_a = 500, rev_b = 250, rev_c = 250,
    cost_a = 200, cost_b = 150, cost_c = 150,
    overhead = 200,
    tax_rate_a = 30, tax_rate_b = 10, tax_rate_c = 10
  ),
  "Small Profit Margin" = list(
    rev_a = 500, rev_b = 250, rev_c = 250,
    cost_a = 360, cost_b = 220, cost_c = 220,
    overhead = 100,
    tax_rate_a = 30, tax_rate_b = 10, tax_rate_c = 10
  ),
  "Small WHT" = list(
    rev_a = 500, rev_b = 250, rev_c = 250,
    cost_a = 300, cost_b = 150, cost_c = 150,
    overhead = 100,
    tax_rate_a = 30, tax_rate_b = 2, tax_rate_c = 2
  ),
  "Loss Abroad" = list(
    rev_a = 500, rev_b = 250, rev_c = 250,
    cost_a = 50, cost_b = 275, cost_c = 275,
    overhead = 100,
    tax_rate_a = 30, tax_rate_b = 10, tax_rate_c = 10
  ),
  "Loss Residence" = list(
    rev_a = 500, rev_b = 250, rev_c = 250,
    cost_a = 450, cost_b = 75, cost_c = 75,
    overhead = 100,
    tax_rate_a = 30, tax_rate_b = 10, tax_rate_c = 10
  )
)

header_tooltips <- c(
  "No relief" = "No relief for foreign tax. Country A taxes total global profit, and foreign withholding taxes remain fully payable.",
  "Deduction" = "Foreign tax is deducted from the tax base, reducing the income taxed in Country A by that amount.",
  "FTC (foreign + domestic)" = "Foreign tax credit capped by total global profit, allowing foreign taxes to reduce tax that would otherwise fall on domestic profit.",
  "FTC (foreign only, direct costs)" = "Foreign tax credit capped by combined foreign profit only, defined as foreign revenue minus direct costs identified to each jurisdiction.",
  "FTC (foreign only, direct + overhead)" = "Foreign tax credit capped by combined foreign profit only, defined as foreign revenue minus direct costs identified to each jurisdiction and minus overhead costs allocated by revenue share.",
  "FTC (per-country, direct costs)" = "Foreign tax credit calculated using separate country baskets for B and C, with each credit capped by that country's profit, defined as revenue minus direct costs identified to that jurisdiction.",
  "FTC (per-country, direct + overhead)" = "Foreign tax credit calculated using separate country baskets for B and C, with each credit capped by that country's profit, defined as revenue minus direct costs identified to that jurisdiction and minus overhead costs allocated by revenue share.",
  "Exemption (residence overhead)" = "All foreign income is exempt in Country A. All overhead costs are assigned to the residence country.",
  "Exemption (revenue-based overhead)" = "All foreign income is exempt in Country A. Overhead costs are allocated across countries by revenue share."
)

cell_tooltips <- data.frame(
  Metric = c(
    "Total credit limit",
    "Credit limit country B",
    "Credit limit country C",
    "Tax payment Country A",
    "Total Tax payment",
    "Total tax rate on profit",
    "Share of foreign tax that is absorbed"
  ),
  "No relief" = c(
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "Tax rate Country A × max(Total global profit, 0)",
    "Tax payment Country A + withholding tax Country B + withholding tax Country C",
    "Total tax payment / Total global profit",
    "0"
  ),
  "Deduction" = c(
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "Tax rate Country A × max(Total global profit − total foreign tax paid, 0)",
    "Tax payment Country A after deduction + withholding tax Country B + withholding tax Country C",
    "Total tax payment / Total global profit",
    "(Tax payment Country A under no relief − Tax payment Country A under deduction) / total foreign tax paid"
  ),
  "FTC (foreign + domestic)" = c(
    "Tax rate Country A × max(Total global profit, 0)",
    "",
    "",
    "Country A tax on total global profit − allowed foreign tax credit",
    "Tax payment Country A after credit + withholding tax Country B + withholding tax Country C",
    "Total tax payment / Total global profit",
    "Foreign tax credit used / total foreign tax paid"
  ),
  "FTC (foreign only, direct costs)" = c(
    "Tax rate Country A × max((Revenue Country B − Direct costs Country B) + (Revenue Country C − Direct costs Country C), 0)",
    "",
    "",
    "Country A tax on total global profit − allowed foreign tax credit",
    "Tax payment Country A after credit + withholding tax Country B + withholding tax Country C",
    "Total tax payment / Total global profit",
    "Foreign tax credit used / total foreign tax paid"
  ),
  "FTC (foreign only, direct + overhead)" = c(
    "Tax rate Country A × max((Revenue Country B − Direct costs Country B − Overhead allocated to Country B) + (Revenue Country C − Direct costs Country C − Overhead allocated to Country C), 0)",
    "",
    "",
    "Country A tax on total global profit − allowed foreign tax credit",
    "Tax payment Country A after credit + withholding tax Country B + withholding tax Country C",
    "Total tax payment / Total global profit",
    "Foreign tax credit used / total foreign tax paid"
  ),
  "FTC (per-country, direct costs)" = c(
    "",
    "Tax rate Country A × max(Revenue Country B − Direct costs Country B, 0)",
    "Tax rate Country A × max(Revenue Country C − Direct costs Country C, 0)",
    "Country A tax on total global profit − credit for Country B − credit for Country C",
    "Tax payment Country A after credits + withholding tax Country B + withholding tax Country C",
    "Total tax payment / Total global profit",
    "(Credit for Country B + Credit for Country C) / total foreign tax paid"
  ),
  "FTC (per-country, direct + overhead)" = c(
    "",
    "Tax rate Country A × max(Revenue Country B − Direct costs Country B − Overhead allocated to Country B, 0)",
    "Tax rate Country A × max(Revenue Country C − Direct costs Country C − Overhead allocated to Country C, 0)",
    "Country A tax on total global profit − credit for Country B − credit for Country C",
    "Tax payment Country A after credits + withholding tax Country B + withholding tax Country C",
    "Total tax payment / Total global profit",
    "(Credit for Country B + Credit for Country C) / total foreign tax paid"
  ),
  "Exemption (residence overhead)" = c(
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "Tax rate Country A × max(Revenue Country A − Direct costs Country A − full overhead, 0)",
    "Tax payment Country A + withholding tax Country B + withholding tax Country C",
    "Total tax payment / Total global profit",
    "0"
  ),
  "Exemption (revenue-based overhead)" = c(
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "Tax rate Country A × max(Revenue Country A − Direct costs Country A − Overhead allocated to Country A, 0)",
    "Tax payment Country A + withholding tax Country B + withholding tax Country C",
    "Total tax payment / Total global profit",
    "0"
  ),
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)


# Define UI
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Double Taxation Elimination Calculator"),
  
  fluidRow(
    column(
      width = 4,
      wellPanel(
        actionButton(
          "reset",
          "Reset to default values",
          icon = icon("refresh"),
          width = "100%"
        ),
        
        br(), br(),
        
        selectInput(
          "scenario_preset",
          "Scenario preset:",
          choices = names(scenario_presets),
          selected = "Default"
        ),
        
        actionButton(
          "load_scenario",
          "Load selected scenario",
          icon = icon("folder-open"),
          width = "100%"
        ),
        
        hr(),
        
        h4("Revenue"),
        numericInput("rev_a", "Revenue Country A (Residence country):", value = 500),
        numericInput("rev_b", "Revenue Country B:", value = 250),
        numericInput("rev_c", "Revenue Country C:", value = 250),
        
        h4("Costs"),
        numericInput("cost_a", "Costs related to Income Country A (Residence country):", value = 300),
        numericInput("cost_b", "Costs related to Income Country B:", value = 150),
        numericInput("cost_c", "Costs related to Income Country C:", value = 150),
        numericInput("overhead", "Overhead Costs:", value = 100),
        
        h4("Tax Rates (%)"),
        numericInput("tax_rate_a", "Tax rate Country A (net profits):", value = 30, step = 1),
        numericInput("tax_rate_b", "Tax rate Country B (withholding):", value = 10, step = 1),
        numericInput("tax_rate_c", "Tax rate Country C (withholding):", value = 10, step = 1)
      )
    ),
    
    column(
      width = 8,
      
      wellPanel(
        h4("Intermediary Calculations"),
        tableOutput("interTable")
      ),
      
      br(),
      
      h4("Cross-crediting Calculation Results"),
      div(
        style = "width: 100%; overflow-x: auto;",
        DTOutput("resultsTable")
      ),
      
      br(), br(),
      
      h4("Live chart: total tax rate on profit"),
      plotOutput("taxBarPlot", height = "420px", width = "100%")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Helper function to apply any preset
  apply_preset <- function(preset_name) {
    preset <- scenario_presets[[preset_name]]
    
    updateSelectInput(session, "scenario_preset", selected = preset_name)
    
    updateNumericInput(session, "rev_a", value = preset$rev_a)
    updateNumericInput(session, "rev_b", value = preset$rev_b)
    updateNumericInput(session, "rev_c", value = preset$rev_c)
    
    updateNumericInput(session, "cost_a", value = preset$cost_a)
    updateNumericInput(session, "cost_b", value = preset$cost_b)
    updateNumericInput(session, "cost_c", value = preset$cost_c)
    updateNumericInput(session, "overhead", value = preset$overhead)
    
    updateNumericInput(session, "tax_rate_a", value = preset$tax_rate_a)
    updateNumericInput(session, "tax_rate_b", value = preset$tax_rate_b)
    updateNumericInput(session, "tax_rate_c", value = preset$tax_rate_c)
  }
  
  observeEvent(input$reset, {
    apply_preset("Default")
  })
  
  observeEvent(input$load_scenario, {
    req(input$scenario_preset)
    apply_preset(input$scenario_preset)
  })
  
  get_rates <- reactive({
    list(
      a = input$tax_rate_a / 100,
      b = input$tax_rate_b / 100,
      c = input$tax_rate_c / 100
    )
  })
  
  pos_part <- function(x) {
    pmax(x, 0)
  }
  
  safe_share <- function(num, den) {
    if (is.na(den) || den <= 0) {
      return(NA_real_)
    }
    num / den
  }
  
  safe_profit_rate <- function(total_tax, total_profit) {
    if (is.na(total_profit) || total_profit <= 0) {
      return(NA_real_)
    }
    total_tax / total_profit
  }
  
  # Intermediary Calculations
  inter_calc <- reactive({
    rates <- get_rates()
    
    tot_rev <- input$rev_a + input$rev_b + input$rev_c
    tot_cost <- input$cost_a + input$cost_b + input$cost_c + input$overhead
    tot_profit <- tot_rev - tot_cost
    
    tax_paid_b <- input$rev_b * rates$b
    tax_paid_c <- input$rev_c * rates$c
    tot_foreign_tax <- tax_paid_b + tax_paid_c
    
    data.frame(
      Metric = c(
        "Total Income (Revenue)",
        "Total Costs (Including Overhead)",
        "Total Global Profit",
        "Tax Paid in Country B",
        "Tax Paid in Country C",
        "Total Foreign Tax Paid"
      ),
      Value = c(
        tot_rev,
        tot_cost,
        tot_profit,
        tax_paid_b,
        tax_paid_c,
        tot_foreign_tax
      )
    )
  })
  
  output$interTable <- renderTable({
    inter_calc()
  }, colnames = FALSE, align = "lr")
  
  # Raw Data Calculation for Regimes
  calc_data <- reactive({
    rates <- get_rates()
    
    tot_rev <- input$rev_a + input$rev_b + input$rev_c
    tot_cost <- input$cost_a + input$cost_b + input$cost_c + input$overhead
    tot_profit <- tot_rev - tot_cost
    
    tax_paid_b <- input$rev_b * rates$b
    tax_paid_c <- input$rev_c * rates$c
    tot_foreign_tax <- tax_paid_b + tax_paid_c
    
    if (tot_rev > 0) {
      oh_a <- input$overhead * (input$rev_a / tot_rev)
      oh_b <- input$overhead * (input$rev_b / tot_rev)
      oh_c <- input$overhead * (input$rev_c / tot_rev)
    } else {
      oh_a <- 0
      oh_b <- 0
      oh_c <- 0
    }
    
    prof_a_dir <- input$rev_a - input$cost_a
    prof_b_dir <- input$rev_b - input$cost_b
    prof_c_dir <- input$rev_c - input$cost_c
    
    prof_a_full_home <- prof_a_dir - input$overhead
    prof_a_full_alloc <- prof_a_dir - oh_a
    prof_b_full <- prof_b_dir - oh_b
    prof_c_full <- prof_c_dir - oh_c
    
    tax_a_base <- pos_part(tot_profit) * rates$a
    
    # 1. No relief
    s1_tax_a <- tax_a_base
    s1_tot_tax <- s1_tax_a + tot_foreign_tax
    s1_rate <- safe_profit_rate(s1_tot_tax, tot_profit)
    s1_abs <- 0
    
    # 2. Deduction
    s2_taxable <- tot_profit - tot_foreign_tax
    s2_tax_a <- pos_part(s2_taxable) * rates$a
    s2_tot_tax <- s2_tax_a + tot_foreign_tax
    s2_rate <- safe_profit_rate(s2_tot_tax, tot_profit)
    s2_abs <- safe_share(s1_tax_a - s2_tax_a, tot_foreign_tax)
    
    # 3. Exemption (residence overhead)
    s3_taxable <- prof_a_full_home
    s3_tax_a <- pos_part(s3_taxable) * rates$a
    s3_tot_tax <- s3_tax_a + tot_foreign_tax
    s3_rate <- safe_profit_rate(s3_tot_tax, tot_profit)
    s3_abs <- 0
    
    # 4. Exemption (revenue-based overhead)
    s4_taxable <- prof_a_full_alloc
    s4_tax_a <- pos_part(s4_taxable) * rates$a
    s4_tot_tax <- s4_tax_a + tot_foreign_tax
    s4_rate <- safe_profit_rate(s4_tot_tax, tot_profit)
    s4_abs <- 0
    
    # 5. FTC (foreign + domestic)
    s5_limit <- pos_part(tot_profit) * rates$a
    s5_credit <- min(tot_foreign_tax, s5_limit, tax_a_base)
    s5_tax_a <- max(tax_a_base - s5_credit, 0)
    s5_tot_tax <- s5_tax_a + tot_foreign_tax
    s5_rate <- safe_profit_rate(s5_tot_tax, tot_profit)
    s5_abs <- safe_share(s5_credit, tot_foreign_tax)
    
    # 6. FTC (foreign only, direct costs)
    s6_limit <- pos_part(prof_b_dir + prof_c_dir) * rates$a
    s6_credit <- min(tot_foreign_tax, s6_limit, tax_a_base)
    s6_tax_a <- max(tax_a_base - s6_credit, 0)
    s6_tot_tax <- s6_tax_a + tot_foreign_tax
    s6_rate <- safe_profit_rate(s6_tot_tax, tot_profit)
    s6_abs <- safe_share(s6_credit, tot_foreign_tax)
    
    # 7. FTC (foreign only, direct + overhead)
    s7_limit <- pos_part(prof_b_full + prof_c_full) * rates$a
    s7_credit <- min(tot_foreign_tax, s7_limit, tax_a_base)
    s7_tax_a <- max(tax_a_base - s7_credit, 0)
    s7_tot_tax <- s7_tax_a + tot_foreign_tax
    s7_rate <- safe_profit_rate(s7_tot_tax, tot_profit)
    s7_abs <- safe_share(s7_credit, tot_foreign_tax)
    
    # 8. FTC (per-country, direct costs)
    s8_lim_b <- pos_part(prof_b_dir) * rates$a
    s8_lim_c <- pos_part(prof_c_dir) * rates$a
    s8_cred_b <- min(tax_paid_b, s8_lim_b)
    s8_cred_c <- min(tax_paid_c, s8_lim_c)
    s8_credit <- min(s8_cred_b + s8_cred_c, tax_a_base)
    s8_tax_a <- max(tax_a_base - s8_credit, 0)
    s8_tot_tax <- s8_tax_a + tot_foreign_tax
    s8_rate <- safe_profit_rate(s8_tot_tax, tot_profit)
    s8_abs <- safe_share(s8_credit, tot_foreign_tax)
    
    # 9. FTC (per-country, direct + overhead)
    s9_lim_b <- pos_part(prof_b_full) * rates$a
    s9_lim_c <- pos_part(prof_c_full) * rates$a
    s9_cred_b <- min(tax_paid_b, s9_lim_b)
    s9_cred_c <- min(tax_paid_c, s9_lim_c)
    s9_credit <- min(s9_cred_b + s9_cred_c, tax_a_base)
    s9_tax_a <- max(tax_a_base - s9_credit, 0)
    s9_tot_tax <- s9_tax_a + tot_foreign_tax
    s9_rate <- safe_profit_rate(s9_tot_tax, tot_profit)
    s9_abs <- safe_share(s9_credit, tot_foreign_tax)
    
    data.frame(
      Metric = c(
        "Total credit limit",
        "Credit limit country B",
        "Credit limit country C",
        "Tax payment Country A",
        "Total Tax payment",
        "Total tax rate on profit",
        "Share of foreign tax that is absorbed"
      ),
      "No relief" = c(NA, NA, NA, s1_tax_a, s1_tot_tax, s1_rate, s1_abs),
      "Deduction" = c(NA, NA, NA, s2_tax_a, s2_tot_tax, s2_rate, s2_abs),
      "FTC (foreign + domestic)" = c(s5_limit, NA, NA, s5_tax_a, s5_tot_tax, s5_rate, s5_abs),
      "FTC (foreign only, direct costs)" = c(s6_limit, NA, NA, s6_tax_a, s6_tot_tax, s6_rate, s6_abs),
      "FTC (foreign only, direct + overhead)" = c(s7_limit, NA, NA, s7_tax_a, s7_tot_tax, s7_rate, s7_abs),
      "FTC (per-country, direct costs)" = c(NA, s8_lim_b, s8_lim_c, s8_tax_a, s8_tot_tax, s8_rate, s8_abs),
      "FTC (per-country, direct + overhead)" = c(NA, s9_lim_b, s9_lim_c, s9_tax_a, s9_tot_tax, s9_rate, s9_abs),
      "Exemption (residence overhead)" = c(NA, NA, NA, s3_tax_a, s3_tot_tax, s3_rate, s3_abs),
      "Exemption (revenue-based overhead)" = c(NA, NA, NA, s4_tax_a, s4_tot_tax, s4_rate, s4_abs),
      check.names = FALSE
    )
  })
  
  display_data <- reactive({
    df <- calc_data()
    
    tot_profit <- input$rev_a + input$rev_b + input$rev_c -
      input$cost_a - input$cost_b - input$cost_c - input$overhead
    
    etr_row <- which(df$Metric == "Total tax rate on profit")
    absorb_row <- which(df$Metric == "Share of foreign tax that is absorbed")
    tax_row <- which(df$Metric == "Total Tax payment")
    
    for (col in names(df)[-1]) {
      num_vals <- df[[col]]
      char_col <- character(nrow(df))
      
      # First format all non-percentage rows normally
      normal_rows <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(df)), c(etr_row, absorb_row))
      char_col[normal_rows] <- ifelse(
        is.na(num_vals[normal_rows]),
        "",
        format(round(num_vals[normal_rows], 2), nsmall = 2)
      )
      
      # Absorption row stays standard percentage formatting
      char_col[absorb_row] <- ifelse(
        is.na(num_vals[absorb_row]),
        "",
        sprintf("%.2f%%", num_vals[absorb_row] * 100)
      )
      
      # ETR row gets custom formatting
      if (!is.na(num_vals[etr_row])) {
        char_col[etr_row] <- sprintf("%.2f%%", num_vals[etr_row] * 100)
      } else {
        total_tax_here <- num_vals[tax_row]
        
        if (!is.na(total_tax_here) && total_tax_here > 0 && tot_profit < 0) {
          char_col[etr_row] <- "Tax exceeds profits"
        } else if (!is.na(total_tax_here) && total_tax_here > 0 && tot_profit == 0) {
          char_col[etr_row] <- "Tax with zero profit"
        } else {
          char_col[etr_row] <- ""
        }
      }
      
      df[[col]] <- char_col
    }
    
    df
  })
  
  prev_df <- reactiveVal(NULL)
  
  enhanced_data <- reactive({
    current <- display_data()
    previous <- isolate(prev_df())
    
    target_rows <- current$Metric %in% c(
      "Total tax rate on profit",
      "Share of foreign tax that is absorbed"
    )
    
    if (is.null(previous)) {
      prev_df(current)
      change_mat <- as.data.frame(
        matrix(FALSE, nrow = nrow(current), ncol = ncol(current))
      )
    } else {
      diff_mask <- current != previous
      diff_mask[is.na(diff_mask)] <- FALSE
      diff_mask[!target_rows, ] <- FALSE
      
      is_changed <- any(diff_mask)
      
      if (is_changed) {
        prev_df(current)
        invalidateLater(10000)
        change_mat <- as.data.frame(diff_mask)
      } else {
        prev_df(current)
        change_mat <- as.data.frame(
          matrix(FALSE, nrow = nrow(current), ncol = ncol(current))
        )
      }
    }
    
    names(change_mat) <- paste0(names(current), "_changed")
    cbind(current, change_mat)
  })
  
  output$resultsTable <- renderDT({
    df_combined <- enhanced_data()
    df_render <- df_combined
    n_cols <- ncol(display_data())
    col_names <- names(df_combined)[2:n_cols]
    
    wrap_tooltip_cell <- function(value, tooltip) {
      if (is.na(value) || value == "") {
        return("")
      }
      
      if (is.na(tooltip) || tooltip == "") {
        return(htmltools::htmlEscape(value))
      }
      
      sprintf(
        '<span class="cell-tip" data-toggle="tooltip" data-placement="top" title="%s" style="cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted #999;">%s</span>',
        htmltools::htmlEscape(tooltip, attribute = TRUE),
        htmltools::htmlEscape(value)
      )
    }
    
    # Keep Metric column plain
    df_render$Metric <- htmltools::htmlEscape(df_render$Metric)
    
    # Add hover tooltips directly to visible result cells
    for (col in col_names) {
      df_render[[col]] <- mapply(
        wrap_tooltip_cell,
        df_combined[[col]],
        cell_tooltips[[col]],
        USE.NAMES = FALSE
      )
    }
    
    custom_container <- htmltools::withTags(
      table(
        class = "display",
        thead(
          tr(
            lapply(names(df_combined), function(nm) {
              if (grepl("_changed$", nm)) {
                th("")
              } else if (nm %in% names(header_tooltips)) {
                th(
                  htmltools::tags$span(
                    class = "header-tip",
                    `data-toggle` = "tooltip",
                    `data-placement` = "top",
                    title = header_tooltips[[nm]],
                    style = "cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted #999;",
                    nm
                  )
                )
              } else {
                th(nm)
              }
            })
          )
        )
      )
    )
    
    dt <- datatable(
      df_render,
      container = custom_container,
      options = list(
        dom = "t",
        paging = FALSE,
        scrollX = TRUE,
        ordering = FALSE,
        columnDefs = list(
          list(visible = FALSE, targets = n_cols:(2 * n_cols - 1))
        )
      ),
      callback = JS(
        "var initTips = function() {
         var $container = $(table.table().container());
         var $els = $container.find('span.cell-tip, span.header-tip');

         $els.tooltip('destroy');

         $els.tooltip({
           container: 'body',
           trigger: 'hover'
         });
       };

       table.on('draw.dt', function() {
         initTips();
       });

       initTips();"
      ),
      rownames = FALSE,
      escape = FALSE
    )
    
    dt <- formatStyle(dt, "Metric", fontWeight = "bold")
    
    for (col in col_names) {
      change_col <- paste0(col, "_changed")
      dt <- formatStyle(
        dt,
        col,
        valueColumns = change_col,
        backgroundColor = styleEqual(
          c(TRUE, FALSE),
          c("#d4edda", "transparent")
        )
      )
    }
    
    dt
  })
  output$taxBarPlot <- renderPlot({
    df <- calc_data()
    
    rate_row <- df[df$Metric == "Total tax rate on profit", -1, drop = FALSE]
    
    plot_dat <- data.frame(
      regime = names(rate_row),
      value = as.numeric(rate_row[1, ]),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    plot_dat$regime <- factor(plot_dat$regime, levels = rev(plot_dat$regime))
    
    if (all(is.na(plot_dat$value))) {
      plot.new()
      text(
        0.5, 0.5,
        "No tax-rate chart available when total profit is zero or negative.",
        cex = 1.1
      )
      return(invisible(NULL))
    }
    
    ggplot(plot_dat, aes(x = regime, y = value)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.8, fill = "#3182BD") +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_y_continuous(
        labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1),
        limits = c(0, max(plot_dat$value, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.1)
      ) +
      labs(
        x = NULL,
        y = "Total tax rate on profit"
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
      theme(
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
      )
  })
}

shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
